summary: A music-backed, narrated montage of a multi-agency ICE raid (May 25) on an illegal cockfighting ring in San Juan, Puerto Rico, framed as an action-operation reel. Stylized captions and a motion-blur zoom transition punch up handheld B-roll of the drive-in, the cockfight site, masked tactical agents marching detainees through brush, and a crowd of arrestees, building to a 'self-deport now' call to action. The cinematic packaging of an enforcement op as spectacle plus the explicit self-deport CTA fit the produced, social-media-native youth-appeal style rather than a raw clip.

script.scene: POV from inside a moving vehicle crossing a causeway over water toward a coastal skyline; caption 'with the support of' over a clear blue-sky daytime drive-in to the operation.
Handheld shot of a makeshift fenced compound with striped tarps and green netting; caption 'took place at an illegal cockfight location' establishes the raid target.
Masked tactical agents in body armor escort a handcuffed man in a white shirt through wooded brush, other detainees and a vehicle marked POLICE visible among the trees.
Stylized motion-blur radial-zoom transition over a tight crowd of detained people with their hands up surrounded by armored agents; caption 'and strengthening our local law enforcement partnerships.'
A masked agent in a green tactical vest reading POLICE / HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS HSI stands beside a silver van; caption 'self-deport now.'

notable_text: with the support of; took place at an illegal cockfight location; and strengthening our local law enforcement partnerships; self-deport now; (tweet) leave now or expect an ICE arrest; ICE.gov/self-deport
